# Security Policy

Thank you for helping keep Konform and its users secure.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do **not** report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

Instead, report them privately through GitHub Security Advisories:

https://github.com/nzhussup/konform/security/advisories/new

## Supported Versions

Security fixes are provided for:

- the latest stable release
- the previous stable release line when a fix can be safely backported

In practice, most security fixes are released in the latest stable version first.
